basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SVNIT. A total of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/physically challenged and women.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/BE in Civil Engineering/Mechanical Engineering, M.Tech/M.E in Structural Engineering/Structural Dynamics Engineering/Earthquake Engineering, GATE/NET qualified
qualification.details: First-division B.Tech/BE in Civil Engineering/Mechanical Engineering and M.Tech/M.E in Structural Engineering, Structural Dynamics Engineering, or Earthquake Engineering with qualified GATE/NET.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years, Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year plus HRA.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SVNIT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SVNIT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: First-division B.Tech/BE in Civil Engineering/Mechanical Engineering and M.Tech/M.E in Structural Engineering, Structural Dynamics Engineering, or Earthquake Engineering with qualified GATE/NET.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/physically challenged and women.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years, Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year plus HRA.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date of receiving the application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at SVNIT is August 2, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/BE in Civil or Mechanical Engineering and an M.Tech/M.E in Structural Engineering, Structural Dynamics Engineering, or Earthquake Engineering, along with a valid GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF post is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/physically challenged candidates and women.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position at SVNIT will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary for the JRF position is Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at SVNIT.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position by sending their complete application via email.

faq.question: Q9. Which departments are eligible for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The eligible engineering branches are Civil Engineering and Mechanical Engineering for B.Tech/BE, and Structural Engineering, Structural Dynamics Engineering, or Earthquake Engineering for M.Tech/M.E.

faq.question: Q10. Where is SVNIT located?
faq.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) is located in Surat, Gujarat, with the pincode 395007.
